KAGUYA-SMOOTHIE.description: Choose a card from the [gold]draw pile[/gold] and one from the [gold]discard pile[/gold] to [gold]Remember[/gold].

KAGUYA-STAR_NIGHT_POTION.title: Sound-Seeking Potion
